hypotheses: HENKIN_FREE : forall c : Henkin_constants, eq (HC_occurs_in_frm c p) false
obligation.goal:
alpha_equiv (twilight_frm p)
  (subst_frm (fun z : ivar => Var_trm (Init.Nat.mul z 2)) p)

HENKIN_FREE : forall c : Henkin_constants,
eq (HC_occurs_in_frm c (Rel_frm R ts)) false

  (Rel_frm R
     (subst_trms (fun z : ivar => Var_trm (Init.Nat.mul z 2)) ts))

HENKIN_FREE : forall c : Henkin_constants,
eq (HC_occurs_in_frm c (All_frm y p)) false
goals.goal:
alpha_equiv (All_frm (Init.Nat.mul 2 y) (twilight_frm p))
  (All_frm
     (chi_frm (fun z : ivar => Var_trm (Init.Nat.mul z 2))
        (All_frm y p))
     (subst_frm
        (cons_subst y
           (Var_trm
              (chi_frm (fun z : ivar => Var_trm (Init.Nat.mul z 2))
                 (All_frm y p)))
           (fun z : ivar => Var_trm (Init.Nat.mul z 2))) p))

attempts:
induction q; simpl; intros H12; try constructor; auto.
- apply alpha_Rel_frm; induction ts; simpl; auto; destruct a; simpl; f_equal; auto;
      try (apply H12; simpl; auto).
-- apply IHts; intros x Hx; apply H12; simpl; auto.
- apply alpha_Eqn_frm; (induction t; simpl; auto; try (apply H12; simpl; auto);
      try (apply IHt; intros x Hx; apply H12; simpl; auto)).
- apply IHq; intro x; split; apply H12; simpl; auto.
- apply IHq1, IHq2; intro x; split; apply H12; simpl; auto.
- set (chi1 := chi_frm T1 (All_frm y q1)). set (chi2 := chi_frm T2 (All_frm y q1)). eapply alpha_All_frm with (z := y).
-- simpl. set (S1 := cons_subst y (Var_trm chi1) T1). set (U1 := one_subst chi1 (Var_trm y)). set (T1' := fun x => if eq_dec x y then Var_trm y else T1 x). have Hcomp1 : subst_frm U1 (subst_frm S1 q1) = subst_frm T1' q1.
{ apply subst_hsubst_compat_in_frm with (sigma := hsubst_compose (to_hsubst S1) (to_hsubst U1)).
---- intro a; rewrite hsubst_compose_frm_spec; simpl. apply subst_hsubst_compat_in_frm with (sigma := to_hsubst T1'); auto. apply hsubst_frm_eq_on_subst; intro a'; apply hsubst_compose_eq.
---- apply hsubst_frm_eq_on_subst; intro a'. apply hsubst_compose_eq. }
set (T2' := fun x => if eq_dec x y then Var_trm y else T2 x). have Hcomp2 : subst_frm (one_subst chi2 (Var_trm y)) (subst_frm (cons_subst y (Var_trm chi2) T2) q1) = subst_frm T2' q1.
{ ... }
rewrite Hcomp1, Hcomp2. apply IHq1. intro x; split.
--- destruct (eq_dec x y) as [e|n]; subst; auto. have Hxfree : is_free_in_frm x (All_frm y q1) = true.
{ simpl; rewrite H12; auto; rewrite n; auto. }
destruct (H12 x Hxfree) as [H1 H2]; auto.
--- destruct (eq_dec x y) as [e|n]; subst; auto. have Hxfree : is_free_in_frm x (All_frm y q1) = true.
{ simpl; rewrite H12; auto; rewrite n; auto. }
destruct (H12 x Hxfree) as [H1 H2]; auto.
-- simpl; auto.
-- simpl; auto.

induction p; simpl.
- apply alpha_Rel_frm; apply twilight_trms_eq_subst_trms; intro c; apply HENKIN_FREE.
- apply alpha_Eqn_frm; [apply twilight_trm_eq_subst_trm; intro c; apply HENKIN_FREE | apply twilight_trm_eq_subst_trm; intro c; apply HENKIN_FREE].
- apply alpha_Neg_frm; apply IHp.
- apply alpha_Imp_frm; [apply IHp1 | apply IHp2].
- let s := (fun z : ivar => Var_trm (Init.Nat.mul z 2)) in
  set (ch := chi_frm s (All_frm y p1));
  apply (alpha_All_frm (2*y) (2*y) ch (twilight_frm p1) (subst_frm (cons_subst y (Var_trm ch) s) p1));
  [ simpl; rewrite one_subst_identity; rewrite subst_frm_comp; rewrite subst_frm_comp;
    erewrite comp_scaling_lemma; [apply IHp; intro c; apply HENKIN_FREE | auto]
  | simpl; reflexivity
  | simpl; apply chi_frm_not_free_in_subst; intro c; apply HENKIN_FREE ].
induction p; constructor; auto; try apply HENKIN_FREE.
